zh.lifeSummary: Richard de Kelly是William de Kelly和Mrs. William de Kelly的兒子，於1204年出生在英國英格蘭戴文。他於大約1224年與Mrs. Richard de Kelly結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1252年在他的家鄉享年48歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Richard de Kelly是William de Kelly和Mrs. William de Kelly的儿子，于1204年出生在英国英格兰戴文。他于大约1224年与Mrs. Richard de Kelly结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1252年在他的家乡享年48岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Kelly
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Kieran, Aileen, John Patrick, Siobhan, Liam, Brigid, Donovan, Eamon, Parnell, Aidan, Clancy.

Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Ceallaigh, or, in some areas, Mac Ceallaigh ‘descendant (or son) of Ceallach’, an ancient Irish personal name, originally a byname meaning ‘bright-headed’, later understood as ‘frequenting churches’ (Irish ceall). There are several early Irish saints who bore this name. Kelly is now the most common of all surnames in Ireland.

Scottish: habitational name from either the lands of Kelly, near Arbroath (Angus), Kellie in Carnbee (Fife), or Kelly in Methlick (Aberdeenshire). Each of these placenames is from Pictish celli or Gaelic coille ‘wood’ + the placename forming suffix -in. Alternatively, from the lands of Kelloe in the barony of Hume (Berwickshire), whose name is of uncertain origin.

variants.name: Kelley
meanings: Irish (Offaly) and English: variant of   Kelly  .

variants.name: Kilkelly
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Bridie.
Irish (Galway): Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Giolla Ceallaigh ‘son of the devotee of (Saint) Ceallach’ (see Kelly ).

variants.name: Killeen
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Donovan, Kieran, Liam.

Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Cillín ‘descendant of Cillín’, a pet form of the personal name Ceallach (see Kelly ). The name was borne by various early Irish saints, including the leader of a 7th-century mission to Franconia and Thuringia, hence the popularity of the personal name Kilian in medieval central Europe.

variants.name: Kellis
meanings: Scottish: patronymic based on   Kelly   as a personal name. Compare   Kellison  .
Greek: descriptive nickname for a bald man, from kelis ‘bald’, a word of Turkish origin (from kel ‘bald’).
History: As a surname of Scottish origin, this has been established in NC since the 18th century.

variants.name: Kellie
meanings: Scottish: variant of   Kelly  .

variants.name: Kellison
meanings: Scottish: patronymic based on   Kelly   as a personal name.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: Richard de Kelly was born in 1204, in Devon, England, United Kingdom as the son of William de Kelly and Mrs. William de Kelly. He married Mrs. Richard de Kelly about 1224. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died in 1252, in his hometown, at the age of 48.

fr.lifeSummary: Richard de Kelly est né en 1204, à Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fils de William de Kelly et Mrs. William de Kelly. Il a épousé Mrs. Richard de Kelly environ 1224. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé en 1252, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 48 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Richard de Kelly wurde 1204 in Devon, England, United Kingdom, als Sohn von William de Kelly und Mrs. William de Kelly geboren. Er hat um 1224 Mrs. Richard de Kelly geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb 1252 im Alter von 48 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Richard de Kelly è nato il nel 1204 nel Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlio di William de Kelly e Mrs. William de Kelly. Lui sposato Mrs. Richard de Kelly circa 1224. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1252, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 48 anni.

ja.Kelley, Devon, England: イギリスイギリスデボン
ja.lifeSummary: Richard de Kellyは1204年にイギリスイギリスデボンでWilliam de KellyとMrs. William de Kellyの息子として生まれた。約1224年にMrs. Richard de Kellyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1252年に故郷で48歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard de Kelly(은)는 1204년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰에서 William de Kelly(와)과 Mrs. William de Kelly의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1224년 Mrs. Richard de Kelly(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1252년 그의 고향에서 48세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Richard de Kelly nasceu em 1204, em Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filho de William de Kelly e Mrs. William de Kelly. Ele casou-se com Mrs. Richard de Kelly aproximadamente 1224. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1252, em sua cidade natal, com 48 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Richard de Kelly родился в 1204 г. в местности девон, Англия, Великобритания. Его родителей звали William de Kelly и Mrs. William de Kelly. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs. Richard de Kelly около 1224 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер в 1252 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 48 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Richard de Kelly nació en 1204, en Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido como hijo de William de Kelly y Mrs. William de Kelly. Se casó con Mrs. Richard de Kelly aproximadamente 1224. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en 1252, en su pueblo, a la edad de 48 años.
